pi_items.source: task.json metadata and verified against verifier.py (line 37) and export_result.sh (line 42). Task description specifies 7 total required shapes (Internet, Router, Switch, PC1, PC2, PC3, Server), while minimum threshold is 6.

task.json description explicitly states 'CONNECT THE DEVICES (REQUIRED - minimum 5 lines)'. Lists 6 possible connections: Internet→Router, Router→Switch, Switch→PC1, Switch→PC2, Switch→PC3, Switch→Server (last is 'or' making minimum 5). Verified in verifier.py (line 38).

task.json description specifies: CLOUD shape labeled 'Internet', RECTANGLE labeled 'Router/Firewall', RECTANGLE labeled 'Switch', three RECTANGLEs labeled 'PC1/PC2/PC3' (computers), RECTANGLE labeled 'Server'. Verified in export_result.sh (lines 69-99) which detects all required element types.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a network topology diagram in draw.io with exactly 7 labeled shapes (Internet cloud, Router, Switch, 3 PCs, Server) saved as 'office_network.drawio' on /home/ga/Desktop. Minimum 5 connections between devices are required. All metadata values are accurate and consistent with task requirements and implementation code.
